Technology that Changes the Game

Enhanced Cleaning

The Dental Pod Pro uses advanced dynamic ultrasonic wave technology, adjusting frequency for each appliance and water level. With a wide range from 42k to 47k Hz, it ensures optimal cavitational pressure for a precise, effective clean every time.

Max Clean mode

An enhanced cleaning mode that combines high pressure, ultrasonic bursts, and consistent cleaning waves. It scrubs your appliance deeply, using bursts to penetrate and remove debris and biofilms.

Modular design

The detachable tank allows easy refilling, emptying, and cleaning without unplugging. This keeps the power inlet safely away from water, enhancing usability, storage, and safety.

Dental Pod Pro

Ultimate Ultrasonic Cleaner Ultimate Ultrasonic Cleaner

Free EU Shipping • 30-days Risk Free

The Dental Pod Pro is the world’s most advanced cleaning solution for oral appliances. With a patented design, market-leading ultrasonic technology and user-friendly features, it provides unparalleled cleaning, quality and experience. 

  • Designed to eliminate bacteria, viruses and pathogens
  • Effortless to use, refill and clean
  • Max Clean mode even breaks down tough stains and buildup
  • Antibacterial tank fits almost all appliance sizes

Ultrasonic cleaning technology has proven safe and reliable, trusted by laboratory, commercial and industrial fields for decades. We have spent the last two years integrating the latest advancements in this trusted technology with new user-friendly features to create the Dental Pod Pro.


The Dental Pod Pro comes with two cleaning modes that use dynamic 42,000-47,000Hz ultrasonic waves to vibrate the solution and produce millions of nano-scale bubbles. These bubbles rapidly expand and collapse, releasing a large amount of energy, which smashes the grime, bacteria and plaque on your appliance. This action, called ‘cavitation’ occurs on average 4,000 times per second, allowing the Dental Pod Pro to still deliver a non-abrasive, yet more thorough, cleaning cycle.

Superior standard cleaning
Market-leading technology enables more powerful and precise cleaning than the original Dental Pod is capable of. The Dental Pod Pro pushes the boundaries of ultrasonic cleaning technology.

Max Clean mode
An additional cleaning setting that uses a combination of more intense and varied ultrasonics to tackle stains and heavy buildup, and uphold optimal hygiene standards, no matter how often you use your appliance.

Modular design
The removable tank makes for easier refilling and cleaning, so that you can keep your Dental Pod Pro anywhere in your home. This modular design allows for improved safety as the power inlet on the base can easily be kept away from any water source.

Smoother experience
Improved noise and heat regulation systems ensure absolute safety of your oral appliance and a smooth user experience.

The original Dental Pod has been revolutionising the way people clean their oral appliances since 2019, but the Dental Pod Pro sets a new standard for oral appliance care with new, market-leading technology and design. It comes with more powerful cleaning capabilities and smarter features, making your appliance routine smoother than ever before.

Our tablets boost your Dental Pod's ultrasonic cleaning power, helping to eliminate bacteria and pathogens, whilst leaving your retainer with a fresh minty taste and smell. This exclusive offer gives you your first subscription order of tablets completely free, before being 10% off for every order following. 3 discounted boxes of 30 tablets are delivered to you every 3 months. If you ever want to cancel, or skip an order, or even just change your delivery details, all of this is easily accessible on our portal.
  • Dynamic 42,000-47,000Hz high-frequency ultrasound
  • Body weight: 525g
  • Total size: 123mm x 123mm x 90mm
  • Tank size: 85mm x 85mm x 40mm
  • Tank material: antibacterial stainless steel and silver alloy
  • Tank volume: 190ml
  • Power supply: DC 12V / 2A, 239v/50hz
  • EU Plug

Please consult your physician if you have a pacemaker or other implantable electronic device.

How tablets work.

Why are the tablets patented, and what do they do?

Bespoke Shape

The unique concave dome shape of our tablets creates a deep cleaning bubble stream as they dissolve in the Dental Pod.

Ultrasonic Boosting

As the tablet dissolves, natural surfactants in the solution alter the properties of water, improving the ultrasonic cleaning effect.

Stains and Bacteria

Anti-microbial ingredients in the tablet formula help remove and break down bacteria and stubborn stains.

Got questions? We've got answers

Designed with accessibility in mind, the Dental Pod Pro is for all oral appliance users! Whether your appliance is old or new, large or small, stained or cloudy - the Pro is the ultimate answer.

The device’s dual cleaning system means that you can choose from standard ultrasonic cleaning or the more powerful and intense Max Clean mode. Max Clean mode runs for 15 minutes, oscillating between high pressure, intense ultrasonic bursts, and consistent ultrasonic cleaning waves. This effectively scrubs your appliance, whilst periodically applying high pressure bursts to penetrate deeper layers of debris. This combination is perfect for tackling plaque and stubborn buildup.

Only using a cleaning tablet is like cleaning your teeth with toothpaste but no toothbrush. Whilst tablets will kill some of the bacteria on your appliance, their cleaning action doesn’t penetrate deeper than surface level. Advanced ultrasonic waves reach harmful bacteria deep in the crevices of your appliance, and provide the agitation needed to dislodge plaque. Brushing your appliance is as laborious as it is ineffective. Not only does brushing fail to reach every angle, it creates micro-scratches in the surface of the plastic, which harbour harmful bacteria. The Dental Pod Pro, however, with its gentle, yet powerful cavitational action, is completely non-abrasive. This is why 1000s of dentists now recommend the Dental Pod for maintaining oral hygiene throughout your orthodontic journey.

The tank and base are separate, detachable components, meaning you can fill, empty and clean the tank without having to unplug from the power source. Simply lift off the tank and place under a tap for filling or emptying, whilst the power inlet on the base can easily be kept away from the water source.

The Dental Pod Pro is safe to use with almost any oral appliance! This includes aligners (including Invisalign), retainers, guards and dentures, made with materials such as clear and opaque plastic, acrylic, ceramic, metal and more. Its large tank capacity accommodates a wide range of appliances and sizes, even fitting multiple appliances at once. The Pro’s market-leading cleaning power means that it can clean older appliances with heavier buildup.

We understand how crucial proper oral appliance care is for your health, and how tedious the cleaning process can be! This is why we have spent the last two years gathering all your feedback, researching, and perfecting a solution that sets a whole new standard. The Dental Pod Pro not only addresses common cleaning problems, but uses the latest and greatest technology to support your oral hygiene and overall health.

If you are looking to give your oral appliance the best possible care and to maintain optimal oral hygiene despite having to wear an appliance, it's time to upgrade your cleaning routine with the Dental Pod Pro. As well as delivering the world's most powerful clean, the device's removable tank has been designed for effortless use and cleaning. Advanced noise and heat regulation systems make for a smoother appliance care experience.

Not at all, despite the Pro having market-leading cleaning power, the ultrasonic cleaning method is completely non-abrasive. It creates millions of micro bubbles which softly but thoroughly clean the entire surface of the appliance without causing any damage. The Dental Pod Pro is designed to safely clean all kinds of materials from metal to aligner plastic.

The recommended cleaning schedule will vary with each oral appliance. We encourage you to check the instructions provided by your dentist or orthodontist. The Dental Pod Pro is able to accommodate any recommended cleaning schedule.

The Dental Pod Pro's removable tank is made from a stainless steel alloy, which you can give a quick wipe down with a Zima Protective Cleaning Wipe.

This is not what the Dental Pod Pro was designed, engineered and tested to clean. However, many customers have let us know that they have had success cleaning jewellery. The underlying cleaning method of ultrasonic cavitation is something that has been used to clean jewellery by professionals for decades. We successfully tested cleaning precious metals in the Dental Pod Pro to ensure customers with grills could clean their appliances safely and effectively.
